title: Goodbye 2017, Hello 2018
summary: 2017 draws to a close and 2018 is knocking. My annual review and preview went to my newsletter, so subscribe or head over to Medium to read them.
content:
2017 draws to a close and 2018 is knocking. My annual review and preview went to my newsletter, so subscribe or head over to Medium to read them.

Every turn of the year, I write a pair of posts: One looks back on my professional achievements and failures of the passing year, the other one defines goals for the next one. I used to publish these posts here on CodeFX:

  • Goodbye 2014 and Hello 2015
  • Goodbye 2015 and Hello 2016
  • Goodbye 2016 and Hello 2017

That was never a good fit, though, because this blog is supposed to contain only technical content. But this year, I have an active newsletter where such content fits in perfectly, so I use it for these two posts. If you don't feel like subscribing, head over to Medium, where I publish them a few days after (including full RSS).

In fact, Goodbye 2017 is already online, Hello 2018 will show up next week (here you go).

I wish you a happy new year’s eve! I hope to see you again in 2018.
